summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 本版本以稳定性和细节调整为主，未提炼出明确的新增产品功能。
summary.en: Change Summary: This version mainly focuses on stability and detail refinements rather than clear new product features.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

本版本以稳定性和细节调整为主

  • 变更说明: 本版本以稳定性和细节调整为主，未提炼出明确的新增产品功能。
  • 影响范围: 影响该版本对应的相关功能区域。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

Windows 环境下的 Codex 路径问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了 Windows 环境下的 Codex 路径问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 hagicode-core 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

This version mainly focuses on stability

  • Change Summary: This version mainly focuses on stability and detail refinements rather than clear new product features.
  • Impact: Affects the related release-note feature area for this version.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

A Codex path issue on Windows.

  • Change Summary: Fixed a Codex path issue on Windows.
  • Impact: Affects Hagicode Core.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
